summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BlockQuest Miners Web3 edutainment game. All backend APIs functioning perfectly. Frontend loads correctly with proper game mechanics, educational popups, progress persistence, and level unlocking system.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns correct response
Progress creation API works with proper data structure
Progress retrieval by player ID functions correctly
Progress update API successfully modifies game state
Progress deletion and 404 handling work as expected
Leaderboard endpoint returns sorted player data
Homepage loads with all required elements (title, Gerry intro, start button)
Educational popups appear and can be properly closed
Level 1 Basic Chain loads with draggable blocks and game mechanics
Chain verification system works and tracks attempts correctly
Level locking system prevents access to locked levels (Level 4 inaccessible)
Sound toggle button in header functions properly
Navigation works (back button, level card clicks)
localStorage initializes and persists game progress
Footer links to BlockQuest HQ display correctly
Reset and Check Chain buttons are clickable and functional
